title: Include reference to Parent item when previewing subitem via connected board column
excerpt: Hi, If I have used a connected board column and the connected board is linked to a column in subitems on another board. When I open the item to view the detail it would be great if the Parent item was mentioned. For exam…

posts.author: k.remy (Katrina_Remy)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, If I have used a connected board column and the connected board is linked to a column in subitems on another board. When I open the item to view the detail it would be great if the Parent item was mentioned. For example in place of “group”

Loving the connected boards feature and subitems. seeing updates all the time! super exciting!

image1195×1259 74.8 KB

posts.author: hlopezvc (Hernan Lopez)
posts.cookedHtml: This Is really needed in order to understand from what parent ítem the subitem Is coming from
